query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A cyan-toned frontal portrait of a bare-shouldered person against a light textured background. The figure is centered, facing directly toward the viewer with a shaved or very short-haired head. A faint horizontal necklace chain is visible at the base of the neck.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, cyan-toned frontal portrait of a bare-shouldered person with a shaved head against a grainy light background, the face smeared horizontally into layered ghosted streaks that dissolve facial features into an unsettling dreamlike distortion. The image carries a sickly blue-green pallor with muted, faded tones and an abstract, surreal quality that evokes psychological distress and dissociation through its motion-blurred obliteration of human identity.
